/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/desktop.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/desktop.dir/desktop_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/desktop.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/desktop.dir/mainwindow.cpp.o -o desktop  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.9.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.9.2
